title: Blueprint Definitions
description: Schema for *.definitions.yaml companion files used to generate service blueprints from contracts.

domain.description: Domain name matching the state machine's domain field (e.g. 'intake').

name.description: Display name for the blueprint (used as the Figma frame title and SVG heading).

stateMachine.description: Relative path from this file to the state machine YAML it references.

lanes.description: Ordered list of swim-lanes. The generator maps actors to lanes via the 'actors' field.

phases.description: Ordered list of blueprint phases. Each phase becomes a column in the grid.

actor.description: Required when type is 'person-action'. Determines card color.

actors.description: Actors whose person-action cards are placed in this lane. May be empty for editorial lanes (regulations, data-events).

Event.description: A state change that occurs during this phase. Use 'published' for events this domain emits (maps to a state machine transition trigger). Use 'subscribed' for events this domain receives from another domain (maps to a rules file 'on:' entry). Exactly one must be present.

published.description: State machine transition trigger name. The generator derives person-action cards from the transition's actors list and a domain-event card from the transition's event effect.

subscribed.description: Cross-domain event name this domain subscribes to (e.g. 'workflow.task.claimed'). The generator resolves the triggered transition from the rules file, emits a domain-event card from that transition's event effect, and generates person-action cards from actorCards.

actorCards.description: Display text for person-action cards, keyed by actor name. For 'published' events, overrides auto-generated text. For 'subscribed' events, required — actors cannot be derived from the cross-domain event.

text.description: Short label for the regulatory requirement.

subtext.description: Clarifying note (e.g. 'If household meets expedited criteria').

description.description: Prose explanation of what this phase represents. For human readers of the definitions file.

events.description: State machine triggers that occur in this phase. Generator uses these to derive person-action and domain-event cards. May be empty for editorial phases with no state machine trigger.

regulations.description: Policy and regulatory requirements that apply in this phase. Rendered as policy cards in the regulations lane.

extras.description: Cards that cannot be derived from the state machine. Keys are lane IDs. Use for: sub-domain actions (workflow, scheduling), editorial applicant-experience content, data entities, background system actions.
